description: Committed, reproducible source<->artifact reconciliation composition (order item 2 / defect 6): the module-set equality now runs through a committed CLI + injected-provider composition used identically in tests and live, instead of a pure function only. Aggregate-only.

composition.source_provider: meta-device construction of the admitted text-only Qwen3_5MoeForCausalLM class -> parameter names (no weights/GPU/memory)
composition.artifact_provider: strict weight-index admission (immutable LFS sha256 identity + frozen grammar) -> canonical module set
composition.map: frozen prefix (model.language_model.* -> model.*) + vision/MTP omission + packed<->numbered expert collapse; exact equality
composition.independence: source from class construction, artifact from index; neither copied into the other

scope_boundary: module-SET correspondence only; NOT load-manifest tensor equality (item 3): exact tensors, quantization aux tensors, dtype/shape, multiplicity, ordering, gate/up fusion, packed layout, and the numbered->packed loader transformation with strict loadability remain open

remaining_order.item_3_load_manifest_semantics: exact tensor/quant-aux/dtype/shape/multiplicity/ordering/fusion + numbered->packed loader transformation, zero ignored/missing/synthesized under strict loading
remaining_order.item_4_identity_binding: full config + Transformers package + source file + class + loader + kernel + runtime identity pin and equality-check
remaining_order.item_7_resource_transition: independently authorized + verified dual-3090 transition (unrelated tenant currently present and active)
remaining_order.item_8_parity: exact quantized forward + VJP/JVP parity before fitting

privacy: aggregate-only; counts and booleans, no module names, tensor values, weights, caches, or local paths
